note_zh: 活動文案與勝負結果由主辦人工維護；不從圈速或排行榜自動推斷。
note_en: Event copy and results are maintained manually by the organizer and are not inferred from leaderboards.

events.format_zh: 單淘汰錦標賽（含敗部復活戰）
events.format_en: Single elimination with a consolation bracket
events.summary_zh: 定峰是節奏變化明顯的山道，包含大量連續彎、中高速路段、減速帶與技術區。穩定的路線、檔位、煞車點、抓地與出彎節奏比單一彎道的極限速度更重要。
events.summary_en: Sadamine combines linked corners, medium-to-high-speed sections, speed bumps, and technical zones. Consistent lines, gearing, braking, grip, and exits matter more than a single-corner peak.

schedule.label_zh: 活動房間開放、練習與現場報到
schedule.label_en: Room opens, practice, and on-site check-in

schedule.label_zh: 確認參賽名單與安排對戰表

registration_zh: 採現場報到，不強制事前報名。
參賽者應在 21:00–21:40 進入活動房間並完成練習與報到。
人數較多時優先安排準時到場、已完成練習且可配合賽程者。
registration_en: On-site check-in; advance registration was optional.
Drivers were asked to enter between 21:00 and 21:40 for practice and check-in.
When capacity was limited, priority went to punctual and prepared drivers.
rules_zh: 避免逆走、惡意干擾、刻意阻擋或影響其他選手。
缺席、卡車、重生或路線爭議由主辦或裁判依現場情況判定。
最終賽制、對戰表與結果以現場主辦判定為準。
rules_en: No wrong-way driving, deliberate interference, or blocking.
Absences, stuck vehicles, respawns, and route disputes were resolved by the organizer or steward.
The organizer's on-site bracket and ruling are final.
events.result_note_zh: 經過敗部復活戰後的最終排名。勝負與名次為主辦人工登錄。
events.result_note_en: Final ranking after the consolation bracket. Results are entered manually by the organizer.

events.summary_zh: FoxBG 製作的 Momiji 同時支援甩尾車與抓地車，適合挑戰山道節奏、連續彎、乾淨過彎與完賽穩定性。活動期間可不限次數挑戰，以世界 UI 的有效時間排序。
events.summary_en: FoxBG's Momiji supports drift and grip cars and rewards rhythm, linked-corner control, clean lines, and consistency. Drivers could make unlimited attempts during the session, ranked by valid world-UI times.

schedule.label_zh: 正式計時開始、現場報到
schedule.label_en: Timing session and on-site check-in begin

registration_zh: 採現場報到，不強制事前報名。
參賽者於 22:00 進入活動房間，在指定時段內可不限次數挑戰。
registration_en: On-site check-in; advance registration was optional.
Drivers entered at 22:00 and could make unlimited attempts during the event window.
rules_zh: 賽道無碰撞，但請避免惡意跟車。
有效成績與排名以現場世界 UI 判定為準。
跑序、嘗試次數與成績計算可由主辦依現場狀況調整。
rules_en: The world has no collision, but malicious following was prohibited.
Valid times and ranking follow the in-world UI.
The organizer could adjust running order, attempts, or scoring to suit on-site conditions.
events.result_note_zh: 以下為 2026-07-18 Momiji 計時賽的 12 筆有效成績，依圈速排序。
events.result_note_en: Twelve valid runs from the July 18, 2026 Momiji time attack, sorted by lap time.

events.title_zh: 第一賽季 第 5 站｜椿線錦標賽
events.summary_zh: 依 VRC 賽車俱樂部第一賽季 Google 試算表回填；空白或語意不明欄位不自行推測。
events.summary_en: Backfilled from the VR Racing Club Season 1 Google Sheet; ambiguous or blank fields were not inferred.
rules_zh: 賽事結果以原始試算表記載為準。
events.result_note_zh: 最終前四名與可明確判讀的對戰已由第一賽季試算表回填。
events.result_note_en: Top four and clearly readable matches were backfilled from the Season 1 spreadsheet.
